provisional_interpretation.summary: 9 stored averages were raw-exportable from the running det=1.25 MHz Ramsey job; the analysis used a even snake-order subset (using first 8 of 9 stored averages for balance). The bridge remains running with final count text 'Final = 43.869 kcps', monitor last_error '', and stop_requested=False. Combined readout2/self-baseline FFT target-bin amplitudes are direct 13C 0.27%, det-13C 0.99%, carrier 1.31%, det+13C 1.22%, old det=1 high/static region 0.14%, static low region 0.71%, and previous 1.9 MHz region 0.36%. At only 400000 shots/point versus planned 800000, this is not claim-grade; use it as progress/provenance and wait for later even-subset or terminal data unless a hard anomaly appears.
provisional_interpretation.claim_policy: Do not fit a final T2star or claim 13C from this running autosave. Wait for terminal 16-average data unless a hard anomaly appears.
